notes: perfect (tamiym) complete, whole, entire, sound, healthful

quotes.text: Many in attendance at the miraculous feeding identified Jesus as "that prophet that should come into the world" (John 6:14). This relates to Deuteronomy 18:15-18, wherein Moses prophesies of the future prophet that God will raise up like unto him. The "great company" then sought to take Jesus "by force, to make him a king" (John 6:15).
quotes.speaker: Thomas R. Valletta
quotes.attr: Thomas R. Valletta, "The True Bread of Life," Ensign, Mar. 1999, 10

notes: "When is a prophet a prophet? Whenever the speaks under the inspiration and influence of the Holy Ghost. … "When prophets write and speak on the principles of the gospel, they should have the guidance of the Spirit.
